title: selaginella auquieri
intro: Selaginella auquieri, also known as the 'Dwarf Spikemoss', is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its small, spiky foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella auquieri include its ability to act as an antioxidant, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions, although its use as a medicinal herb is not widely recognized or studied in modern medicine.
